name: Hero
description: A master swordsman who channels rage into devastating combo attacks.
lore: Once an ordinary adventurer, the Hero honed their blade skills through relentless training. They embody the classic warrior spirit of Maple World's Explorer lineage.

name: Paladin
description: A holy knight who wields elemental charges and divine protection to support allies.
lore: Blessed by the light, the Paladin stands as an unyielding bulwark against darkness. Their elemental charges can shift the tide of any battle.

name: Dark Knight
description: A dark warrior who sacrifices HP for immense power and possesses the ability to cheat death.
lore: Walking the line between life and death, the Dark Knight draws strength from the abyss. Their Final Pact allows them to defy mortality itself.

name: Arch Mage (Fire/Poison)
description: A master of fire and poison magic who excels at damage-over-time and area destruction.
lore: Through decades of arcane study, this mage unlocked the volatile synergy of flame and venom. Their sustained damage burns through even the toughest foes.

name: Arch Mage (Ice/Lightning)
description: A mage commanding ice and lightning who freezes and shocks enemies with chilling efficiency.
lore: Harnessing the raw fury of storms and the stillness of absolute zero, this mage controls the battlefield. Their freezing abilities provide unmatched crowd control.

name: Bishop
description: A holy mage who heals allies, resurrects the fallen, and amplifies experience gain.
lore: Devoted to the sacred arts, the Bishop channels divine energy to mend wounds and banish evil. They are the most sought-after support class in all of Maple World.

name: Bowmaster
description: An expert archer who unleashes a relentless storm of arrows with unmatched attack speed.
lore: The Bowmaster perfected the art of archery to its absolute pinnacle. Their Hurricane skill fires arrows so fast they create a continuous stream of destruction.

name: Marksman
description: A precision crossbow specialist who deals massive damage from long range with piercing bolts.
lore: Where the Bowmaster values speed, the Marksman values devastating precision. A single bolt from their crossbow can split through multiple targets.

name: Night Lord
description: A master assassin who hurls throwing stars with deadly speed and precision.
lore: Operating from the shadows, the Night Lord perfected the art of ranged assassination. Their throwing stars find their marks with unerring accuracy.

name: Shadower
description: A cunning rogue who uses stealth, trickery, and meso explosions to overwhelm enemies.
lore: The Shadower fights dirty and proud of it, turning gold coins into lethal weapons. Their mastery of shadows makes them nearly impossible to pin down.

name: Dual Blade
description: A dual-wielding assassin who chains rapid blade combos with flashy aerial maneuvers.
lore: Trained in a secret sect within the Explorer thieves, the Dual Blade wields two weapons with lethal grace. Their loyalty was once torn between Lady Syl and the Dark Lord.

name: Buccaneer
description: A brawling pirate who fights with raw fist power and transforms into a supercharged state.
lore: The Buccaneer channels energy through their fists, unleashing devastating punches that shatter the earth. Their Transformation state pushes their physical abilities beyond human limits.

name: Corsair
description: A gunslinging pirate captain who commands a crew of summoned allies and explosive firepower.
lore: The Corsair rules the seas with gunpowder and charisma, summoning loyal crewmates to fight alongside them. Their arsenal includes everything from pistols to battleship cannons.

name: Cannoneer
description: A heavy artillery pirate who wields an enormous hand cannon with devastating explosive power.
lore: Shipwrecked and raised by monkeys, the Cannoneer found their calling in massive firepower. Their hand cannon obliterates everything in its blast radius.

name: Pathfinder
description: An ancient bow wielder who switches between three arrow modes for versatile combat.
lore: The Pathfinder discovered a cursed ancient bow that grants tremendous power at a mysterious cost. They journey to uncover the truth behind the relic and their own lost memories.

name: Dawn Warrior
description: A Knight of Cygnus who wields the power of light and dark through stance-switching combat.
lore: Blessed by the Empress Cygnus and guided by the sun spirit, the Dawn Warrior fights with radiant swordplay. They alternate between solar and lunar stances to devastating effect.

name: Blaze Wizard
description: A Cygnus Knight mage who commands living flames that follow a controllable orbital path.
lore: Guided by the fire spirit Ignis, the Blaze Wizard weaves intricate patterns of flame. Their unique orbital fire system requires precise cursor control for maximum damage.

name: Wind Archer
description: A Cygnus Knight archer who commands the wind to guide arrows and create devastating trifling gusts.
lore: In harmony with the wind spirit, the Wind Archer bends the very air to guide their arrows. Their Trifling Wind summons autonomous wind arrows that assault enemies relentlessly.

name: Night Walker
description: A Cygnus Knight assassin who manipulates shadows and throws stars empowered by darkness.
lore: Embracing the shadow spirit, the Night Walker operates in absolute darkness. Their shadow bats and darkness-infused stars make them deadlier than any ordinary assassin.

name: Thunder Breaker
description: A Cygnus Knight brawler who chains lightning-infused martial arts combos with fluid link skills.
lore: Channeling the thunder spirit's power through their fists, the Thunder Breaker strikes with electric fury. Their unique link skill system rewards precise combo chains with amplified damage.

name: Mihile
description: The captain of the Cygnus Knights who wields the legendary Soul Shield for perfect defense.
lore: Mihile is the unwavering shield of Empress Cygnus, sworn to protect her with his life. His Royal Guard skill allows him to block any attack with precise timing.

name: Aran
description: A legendary hero who wields a massive polearm with command-input combo attacks.
lore: Aran was one of the six heroes who sealed the Black Mage centuries ago, losing all memories in the process. Reawakened on Rien Island, they must relearn their devastating combo techniques.

name: Evan
description: A young dragon master who fights alongside their Onyx Dragon companion Mir using fusion skills.
lore: Evan inherited the spirit of the legendary Dragon Master Freud and bonded with the dragon Mir. Together, they combine human magic and dragon breath into powerful fusion attacks.

name: Mercedes
description: The Elf Queen who dual-wields bowguns with elegant aerial combos and lightning-fast mobility.
lore: Queen of the elves and one of the six heroes, Mercedes was frozen in ice along with her entire kingdom. She fights to restore Elluel and reclaim her legendary speed.

name: Phantom
description: A gentleman thief who steals and uses skills from other Explorer classes.
lore: The legendary phantom thief joined the heroes to avenge his beloved Aria, who was murdered by the Black Mage's commanders. His ability to copy any skill makes him infinitely versatile.

name: Luminous
description: A mage of light and darkness who alternates between two opposing magical affinities.
lore: Luminous was the mage who delivered the final blow to the Black Mage, but was corrupted by dark magic in the process. He now struggles to balance the light and darkness within.

name: Shade
description: A forgotten hero who summons fox spirits and was erased from everyone's memory.
lore: Shade sacrificed his very existence to help seal the Black Mage, causing the world to forget he ever lived. He fights alongside spirit foxes, carrying the loneliest burden of all the heroes.

name: Demon Slayer
description: A demon who betrayed the Black Mage and uses demon fury instead of MP for devastating attacks.
lore: Once a commander of the Black Mage, the Demon Slayer turned against his master after discovering his family was murdered. His rage fuels a unique Demon Fury resource system.

name: Demon Avenger
description: A demon warrior who scales with HP instead of traditional stats, sacrificing life force for power.
lore: Sharing the same origin as the Demon Slayer, the Demon Avenger chose to channel their demonic blood itself as a weapon. Their power grows with their maximum HP rather than conventional stats.

name: Battle Mage
description: A close-combat mage who fights with auras and teleport-based melee attacks.
lore: The Battle Mage defies the traditional image of a fragile spellcaster by fighting on the front lines. Their unique aura system and telecast mechanics create a hybrid melee-magic playstyle.

name: Wild Hunter
description: A mounted crossbow fighter who rides a jaguar companion while firing and summoning allies.
lore: The Wild Hunter formed an unbreakable bond with their jaguar mount, fighting as one against the Black Wings. They can attack while moving at full speed atop their feline partner.

name: Mechanic
description: A tech genius who pilots a mech suit and deploys an arsenal of robotic summons.
lore: The Mechanic uses Resistance engineering to build a powerful mech suit and an army of support robots. Their summon-heavy playstyle turns the battlefield into an automated warzone.

name: Blaster
description: A high-APM warrior who uses arm cannons and complex combo chains with rocket-powered mobility.
lore: Equipped with experimental Resistance arm cannons, the Blaster is a relentless close-combat powerhouse. Mastering their combo and reload system requires the highest APM of any class.

name: Xenon
description: A cybernetic hybrid who uses all three stats and switches between multiple combat modes.
lore: Xenon was a human child kidnapped and converted into a cyborg weapon by Gelimer of the Black Wings. They escaped and now fight to recover their lost humanity while wielding cutting-edge energy weapons.

name: Kaiser
description: A dragon warrior from Grandis who transforms into a powerful draconic form.
lore: Kaiser is the latest inheritor of the Nova dragon warrior lineage from the Grandis world. He transforms into a mighty dragon form to protect his people from Magnus's tyranny.

name: Angelic Buster
description: A magical girl idol who fires soul energy blasts with flashy, pop-star-themed attacks.
lore: A young Nova girl named Tear made a pact with the ancient dragon Eskalade to gain magical powers. She transforms into the idol hero Angelic Buster to save Grandis in style.

name: Cadena
description: A chain-wielding street fighter who uses rapid combo attacks with multiple weapon switches.
lore: Cadena is a Nova who was raised in the slums of Savage Terminal after her family was destroyed by Magnus. She chains together different weapons in rapid succession for devastating freestyle combos.

name: Illium
description: A Flora crystal mage who commands a sentient crystal and uses flight-based magical combat.
lore: Illium is a young Flora who bonded with the ancient Crystal of Aether, gaining extraordinary magical powers. He fights to protect the remnants of his people from the tyranny of Darmoor.

name: Adele
description: A Flora knight who commands floating ethereal swords using telekinetic Aether power.
lore: Adele was an elite knight of the High Flora who was betrayed and sealed away for centuries. Awakened with fragmented memories, she commands spectral blades that fight autonomously at her will.

name: Hoyoung
description: A mischievous sage who uses Taoist magic and transforms between three elemental stances.
lore: Hoyoung is a young Anima sage who accidentally released a dangerous fiend and must now recapture it. His Taoist arts let him command the powers of heaven, earth, and humanity.

name: Lara
description: A nature-attuned bell mage who communicates with mountain spirits and harnesses their power.
lore: Lara is a gentle Anima girl from the mountains who hears the voices of nature spirits. She wields a magical bell to channel the spirits' power and bring harmony to the land.

name: Kain
description: A cursed Anima gunslinger who wields a malice-fueled weapon and fights to suppress his dark power.
lore: Kain is a Drakas (dragon-type Anima) who was used as a living weapon by a sinister organization. He fights to control the malice within while seeking freedom and redemption.

name: Zero
description: Twin siblings Alpha and Beta who tag-team with two different weapon styles in Mirror World.
lore: Alpha and Beta are two halves of the Child of the Transcendent of Time, split apart and trapped in Mirror World. They must work together, switching between speed and power, to break free.

name: Kinesis
description: A modern-day psychic from Seoul who uses telekinesis to hurl objects and control gravity.
lore: Kinesis is a high school student from modern-day Seoul who possesses powerful psychic abilities. He was pulled into Maple World through a dimensional rift and now fights with telekinetic force.

name: Hayato
description: A samurai warrior from Zipangu who wields a katana with rapid battoujutsu swordsmanship.
lore: Hayato is a wandering samurai from the land of Zipangu who crossed dimensions to Maple World. His lightning-fast katana techniques embody the way of the sword.

name: Kanna
description: A shrine maiden from Zipangu who summons spirits and supports allies with powerful kishin magic.
lore: Kanna is a spirit medium from Zipangu who commands the power of yokai and spirits. Her Kishin Shoukan was once the most coveted support skill in all of Maple World.

name: Beast Tamer
description: A young girl who commands four animal companions, each granting a different combat mode.
lore: Chase is a cheerful girl who can communicate with animals, gaining the allegiance of a bear, snow leopard, hawk, and cat. Each companion transforms her combat style entirely.

name: Mo Xuan
description: A scholarly mage from the East who wields ink-brush magic and calligraphic techniques.
lore: Mo Xuan is a scholarly practitioner of ancient calligraphic arts whose brushstrokes come to life as magical attacks. They bridge the gap between art and arcane power from a forgotten eastern tradition.

name: Lynn
description: A glaive-wielding warrior from the East who uses flowing martial arts with elegant weapon mastery.
lore: Lynn is a traveling martial artist who wields a glaive with graceful, dance-like movements. She journeyed from her homeland in search of worthy opponents and a greater purpose.
